calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Relief To Set Aside Void Order Of Default And Void Default Judgments
Off Calendar Jul-28-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT JOHN NORTHORP Motion for Relief to Set Aside Order of Default and Default Judgment. Appearances: Kristina M. Zinnen, Esq. of Weinberg, Roger & Rosenfeld (510) 337-1001, appearing for Plaintiffs and opposing party; Jill Barwick, Esq. of the Barwick Law Firm, (707) 250-1799, appearing for Defendant and moving party. Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion is denied. Amended proofs of service indicate defendant was properly served with summons and complaint and had actual notice of the proceedings. Copies of additional and subsequent filing were sent to defendant's address, and none were returned undeliverable. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-13-2009 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jan-08-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Kristina M. Zinnen, Esq. appeared for plaintiff the Board of Trustees of the Laborers Health and Welfare Trust Fund for Northern California, Laborers' Vacation-Holiday Trust Fund for Northern California, Laborers' Pension Trust Fund for Northern California and Laborers' Training and Retraining Fund for Northern California.
John Hagan, Accounts Receivable Manager for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendant John Northrop, individually and dba Kristin Construction Company.
Default was entered against defendant on January 7, 2008. Amended Default was entered on October 23, 2008.
Doe defendant were dismissed today, January 8, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff the Laborers Health and Welfare Trust Fund for Northern California, Laborers' Vacation-Holiday Trust Fund for Northern California, Laborers' Pension Trust Fund for Northern California and Laborers' Training and Retraining Fund for Northern California and against the Defaulted Defendant John Northrop, individually and dba Kristin Construction Company as follows:

Damages/Principal - $1,650.00.
Principal - 96,455.55.
Prejudgment Interest - $25,134.88.
Attorney's Fees - $7,187.50.
Costs - $595.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $131,022.93.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-24-2008 Continued To Jan-26-09 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
